ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-12-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 3,2002
Off Calendar Dec-03-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lavon Gramger. Cary L. Dictor, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff, Commonwealth Land Title. Default entered against Justino M. Ortega. The Coourt reviews the Declarations of 1) Marilynne McDuffey, employee; 2) Susan Bignale, Esq. of the legal department and 3) Lorene J. Steward, Custodian of Records in lieu of live testimony. The Court having received evidence and good cause appearing, grants Judgment as follows: Principal: $77,301.03; Interest: $11,987.88; Fees & Costs: $2,354.51 for a total Judgment of $91'643.42. Judgment signed in open Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
